The '''Blue Mountains''' was the collective name for a range on [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]], just outside the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Montellian Serat/Legends|Montellian Serat]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Senator [[Vien'sai'Malloc]] from Devaron planted a rumor saying that [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] had established a base of operations in the south side of the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. Actually, Vien'sai'malloc had allied herself with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] and was trying to hide the truth: that the base was a hidden military fortress for the Separatists, from where they launched raids against [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] convoys. However, when facing the cruelty of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], Vien'sai'malloc tried to atone for her past deeds revealing the true location of the base to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]. Thanks to this action, the Separatist base on Blue Mountains could be disabled.

The [[Eyes of Laqasa]] were rumored to be stored in a hunting lodge deep within the Blue Mountains. These [[The Force/Legends|Force-imbued]] [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]] featured in a popular Devaronian legends about [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Laqasa Trill/Legends|Laqasa Trill]].<ref name="NoP" />
